overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a neon-lit city sidewalk at night. The scene transitions from an open street corner with large billboards into an enclosed underpass corridor illuminated by green and purple neon signage, featuring dense urban infrastructure and atmospheric haze typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk with corner billboards

events.description: begins at street corner with large neon signage, transitioning onto the main sidewalk
character accelerates from standing to walking pace along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and storefronts, moving away from the corner

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
futuristic cars driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large red neon sign with white text reading NO FUTURE mounted on building corner
illuminated advertisement billboard with EL GUAPO branding visible
elevated highway or monorail tracks running overhead with support columns
tall industrial street light illuminating the sidewalk with white light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a cyberpunk street corner featuring a prominent red NO FUTURE neon sign. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road, passing under the shadow of an elevated overpass structure. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions while futuristic vehicles drive past on the left.

events.description: moving deeper under the overpass structure, sky becomes mostly obscured
bright green neon CYBER sign becomes visible and illuminates the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk under the overpass, passing other pedestrians and approaching the green neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the storefront entrance looking at the window

entered.detail: bright green neon sign spelling CYBER in capital letters above a storefront
yellow automated vending cart or food stall on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a semi-covered walkway under heavy infrastructure. The green neon CYBER sign becomes a focal point on the right as the character approaches. The sky is mostly blocked by the overpass above, and the lighting shifts to artificial sources. A yellow vending cart sits on the sidewalk near the CYBER storefront.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian corridor with industrial piping and neon lighting

events.description: entering deeply enclosed underpass with dense industrial infrastructure overhead
green neon lights from storefronts cast strong colored illumination on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow underpass with neon-lit storefronts, following a distant pedestrian

entered.detail: storefront with intense green neon lighting and glass windows
dense cluster of exposed industrial pipes and cables running overhead
multiple stacked holographic advertisements on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The corridor becomes narrow and fully enclosed with no visible sky. Dense industrial infrastructure including hanging pipes and cables dominates the ceiling. Bright green neon storefronts line the right side while stacked digital billboards illuminate the left. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with heavy atmospheric haze and colored lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial underpass with purple signage

events.description: purple neon signs become prominent on the right wall, shifting the color palette

agents.ego_description: continuing through the underpass past glowing storefronts with purple and green neon

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: purple neon advertisement sign reading TOPOLOGIC with white text
large illuminated purple and white advertisement panel

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the enclosed underpass where the lighting shifts to prominent purple neon signs including a large TOPOLOGIC advertisement. The corridor remains narrow with industrial elements overhead and glowing storefronts on the right. The character follows a distant pedestrian deeper into the neon-lit passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit street corner into a claustrophobic urban underpass. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a busy multi-lane road, passing a prominent red NO FUTURE neon sign while futuristic vehicles stream past. As the character moves forward, the open sky is gradually obscured by the heavy shadow of an elevated overpass structure. The scene then shifts into a semi-covered walkway where the lighting transitions to artificial hues, centering on a glowing green CYBER sign and a yellow vending cart. Finally, the environment closes in as the camera follows the character deeper into the dense infrastructure of the city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, enclosed urban underpass that shifts from a green-hued industrial zone into a purple-lit neon corridor. It begins in a confined space where the sky is completely obscured by a ceiling of dense hanging pipes and cables, with bright green neon storefronts lining the right and stacked digital billboards on the left. As the camera pushes forward through the heavy atmospheric haze, the surrounding industrial infrastructure remains constant while the dominant lighting begins to transition. The scene then shifts toward a deep purple glow, highlighted by a large Topologic advertisement and glowing storefronts. Finally, the camera follows a distant pedestrian deeper into the neon-lit passage, moving further into the heart of the enclosed corridor.
